Replace the <fragment> tag with FragmentContainerView.
If you plan to use data binding in a Kotlin project, you should apply the kotlin-kapt plugin.
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This `FrameLayout` layout or its `FrameLayout` parent is unnecessary
Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
Use the KTX extension function `Bitmap.scale` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Bitmap.scale` instead?
Missing `contentDescription` attribute on image
Missing `contentDescription` attribute on image
Missing `contentDescription` attribute on image
Missing `contentDescription` attribute on image
Hardcoded string "查看头像", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "从相册选择", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "拍照", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "取消", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "返回", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "确定", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "注册", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "已有账号？ 去登录", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "请输入手机号", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "请输入密码", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "注册", should use `@string` resource
`@id/tvTitle` can overlap `@id/ivMore` if @string/feature_user_profile_title grows due to localized text expansion
The project references RTL attributes, but does not explicitly enable or disable RTL support with `android:supportsRtl` in the manifest
